title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness that enables building custom agent workflows. It is used in the AI Dark Factory project to orchestrate code generation and shipping tasks across multiple language models.
